arts.ttl: Former Middlesbrough favourite in 'the form of his career' for Championship rivals
arts.sum: That already sees him over halfway to equalling his professional career best, achieved in his first season at Boro when he top-scored for Neil Warnock's side with nine goals. Praising his current form, which comes as Millwall are short of attacking options after Josh Coburn's injury, Harris told South London Press: “His numbers are there – his goals and assists are there.

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough vs Stoke predictions: Boro can bounce back with victory
arts.sum: Middlesbrough take on Stoke City at the Riverside Stadium on Saturday and Dan Childs expects the home side to win a high-scoring Championship encounter.

arts.ttl: Van den Berg, Howson, Gilbert and Forss - Middlesbrough injury latest for Stoke City's visit - Teesside Live
arts.sum: Rav van den Berg is in contention to make his return from injury for Middlesbrough against Stoke City at the weekend, though Jonny Howson is unlikely to be available. Carrick said: "Rav has been in and around the group quite a bit.
